---
description: "Use when editing the vedenie page content, leadership roster layout, or static club-management sections in pages/vedenie.html."
applyTo: "pages/vedenie.html"
---

# Vedenie Page Guidelines

- Treat this page as a mostly static leadership and club-information page.
- Keep shared `session.js`, `header.js`, `cloudinary-assets.js`, and `footer.js` hooks intact.
- If you add data-driven content here, follow the existing API-base and shared-helper conventions used on the rest of the site.
